description: Color photograph of an older man (per the tweet, Vietnamese national Long Than Lam) shown from the chest up against a plain gray wall, with a gray locker or cabinet edge visible at left. He has graying short hair and a gray mustache and wears a dark navy hooded sweatshirt printed with the words 'Football MOM' in light blue glittery script. The shot is frontal and evenly lit, with no overlay, slogan, agency seal, or added layout. Per the accompanying ICE tweet, he has convictions listed as attempted murder, assault with a deadly weapon, and firing at an inhabited dwelling, and he faces deportation.
notable_text: Football MOM (text printed on the subject's sweatshirt; no agency-added overlay text)
